discoverySummary: Codex uses AGENTS.md as the shared operating guide for this repository.
personalConfigGuidance: Keep personal Codex configuration outside project-specific canonical assets unless a project explicitly documents otherwise.
rules: AGENTS.md remains the canonical root operating guide.
.codex is a pointer to .ai when Codex-specific path identity is activated.
Put shared Codex-specific behavior in .ai/codex/overrides and project-specific Codex behavior in .ai-overlay/codex/overrides.
